commit_scope: Promote the BML GET/read family as a grouped 52-route native front-door batch

local_validation.notes: Static deploy guard proves all 52 BML GET/read RouteCell paths are covered by grouped Traefik ingress; focused Python provenance tests pass; Rust BML route selection passes. Runtime report stays honest: production is still 45 kernel-first served until the grouped BML read front door is deployed and the /api/ready proof header flips native.

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: Public promoted-BML canaries now include representative reads across the grouped batch. Public deployment proof waits for merge/deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI, merge, and public deploy validation remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: After deploy, the grouped BML GET/read family routes to the native BML front door with X-Form-Router: native-kernel and per-handler X-Form-Handler proof headers, moving the public served count from 45 toward 92 when the BML read proof route flips live.
test_flows: Verify representative promoted BML reads return 2xx, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, X-Form-Python-Authority: false, and their expected X-Form-Handler.
Verify /api/spec-registry/cards and /api/spec-registry/source-list are excluded from the grouped spec detail router.
Verify runtime_surface_report counts 52 BML read-capable routes but does not count them as served until /api/ready returns native BML proof headers.
